title: Update taskctl status to show elapsed time in current stage
description: In `packages/Claude/src/tasks/tool.ts` (or whichever file renders `taskctl status` output), compute elapsed time from `pipeline.last_activity` to `Date.now()` and append it to the stage label. Output should read e.g. `Pipeline: adversarial-running (attempt 1, 4m 32s)`.
acceptance_criteria: `taskctl status` output includes elapsed time for in-progress pipeline stages. Uses `formatElapsed` utility. Tests pass. Linting passes.

comments.author: adversarial-pipeline
comments.message: Verdict: APPROVED — Implementation is correct and complete. `formatElapsed` utility is properly added to `format.ts`, used in `job-commands.ts` to append elapsed time to in-progress pipeline stage labels, and covered by tests for both the utility and the status command. Typecheck passes with 0 errors, all 22 tests pass. Terminal stages set `last_activity: null` so no stale elapsed time is shown. The missing trailing newline in `commands.test.ts` is pre-existing (dev branch also lacks it).

comments.author: system
comments.message: Committed to branch by @ops. Task closed.
